name: On Becoming a God in Central Florida
original_name: On Becoming a God in Central Florida
overview: In the early 1990s, a recently widowed, impoverished Orlando water park employee schemes and cons her way up the ranks of the multi-billion dollar pyramid scheme which ruined her financially in the first place.
